skills.name: prd-assessment
skills.description: Three-mode PRD skill: CREATE (interview → new PRD for greenfield projects), ASSESS (existing PRD + architecture → IMPACT-ASSESSMENT.md), PIVOT (direction change → impact assessment with skills to disable, invalidated context MDs, and affected in-flight cards).
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: qa-engineer
skills.description: Helps define test strategies, write test cases, classify bugs, estimate story points, and generate QA documentation for software teams.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: frontend-spec
skills.description: Generates detailed frontend component specs, design tokens, and implementation guides optimized for AI-assisted development with React/TypeScript.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: card-generator
skills.description: Reads an IMPACT-ASSESSMENT-PRD-XXX.md and generates a Jira-ready card list grouped by role. Each card includes PRD reference, exact file scope, do-not-touch list, acceptance criteria, size (XS/S/M only), and 3 log fields. Auto-splits L/XL estimates.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: coding-standards
skills.description: Template skill for enforcing team coding patterns in every dev session. Ships with [FILL IN] placeholders for Frontend, Backend, ML/Data, and QA roles. Lead populates it once per project — developers get consistent pattern enforcement automatically.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: pre-review-checklist
skills.description: Review Buddy skill that runs a structured 5-check gate on every PR before QA or Lead review. Checks scope compliance, AC verifiability, do-not-touch violations, schema compliance, and pattern compliance. Outputs PASS or FAIL with specific callouts. Role-aware.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: fe-best-practices
skills.description: Frontend best practices for React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + React Query. Organized by concern: state management, UI components, forms, data fetching, error handling, TypeScript, file structure, and performance. Auto-loads in every frontend dev session.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: be-best-practices
skills.description: Backend best practices for Node.js + Zod + Prisma + PostgreSQL + MongoDB + Redis. Organized by concern: request validation, Prisma patterns, MongoDB patterns, Redis caching, error handling, API design, TypeScript, and file structure. Auto-loads in every backend dev session.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: context-audit
skills.description: Lead sprint-start skill for context health checks. Compares a module's context MD against actual repo files and flags missing files, untracked new files, dependency drift, pattern drift, and staleness. Outputs CLEAN / STALE / OUTDATED status with a copy-paste ready CONTEXT-HEALTH.md row.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: devops-infra
skills.description: DevOps role skill covering the full deployment cycle: deployment protocol step sequence, pre-deploy checklist, 30-min post-deploy Sentry monitoring, deployment changelog per PRD number, CI/CD conventions for self-hosted infrastructure, and rollback protocol with decision criteria.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: design-audit
skills.description: Premium UI/UX design audit using Steve Jobs and Jony Ive philosophy. Reads actual code to identify hierarchy, spacing, and consistency issues. Outputs a phased improvement plan (Critical → Refinement → Polish) with exact file references. Supports Figma-to-code gap analysis.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: design-principles
skills.description: Steve Jobs and Jony Ive design philosophy distilled into actionable rules: The Jobs Filter, hierarchy, consistency, whitespace, alignment, and responsive design. Quick reference for any design decision. Pairs with design-audit for the full workflow.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Create or improve frontend interfaces with high design quality. Operates in two modes: Design System Mode (works within existing tokens and components) and Creative Mode (greenfield with full aesthetic latitude). Covers React, Next.js, Vue, and HTML/CSS.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: ui-ux-pro-max
skills.description: Comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence with 50+ styles, 97 color palettes, 57 font pairings, and 99 UX guidelines across 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Generates full design systems, page-specific overrides, and stack-specific best practices.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: web-design-guidelines
skills.description: Reviews UI code against Vercel's Web Interface Guidelines. Fetches the latest rules from the official source and checks your files for compliance: accessibility, semantic HTML, focus management, keyboard navigation, and interaction patterns.
skills.author: talisik-ai

skills.name: project-bootstrap
skills.description: Two-mode Lead skill for project initialization. BOOTSTRAP: interview-driven setup for new projects — generates ARCHITECTURE.md, stub context MDs, and CONTEXT-HEALTH.md. ONBOARD: scans an existing codebase, infers stack and modules, interviews Lead to fill gaps, then produces the same three output files. Run once per new project or legacy onboarding.
skills.author: talisik-ai
